positive: A whimsical and stylized forest scene featuring silhouetted fauna and flora. The central elements include a wise-looking owl perched on a sprawling, illuminated moonlit branch, surrounded by glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and stylized, twisting vines. Below the owl, a playful fox and deer are captured mid-movement, creating dynamic negative space. The composition must be perfectly circular and highly contrasted, suitable for a sticker or T-shirt print. Style: Minimalist graphic novel meets Art Nouveau illustration, using solid black silhouettes against a vibrant gradient background of deep indigo, turquoise, and pale gold. Flat vector aesthetic, clean lines, highly detailed yet easily repeatable pattern elements. Centered, circular framing, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noisy, watermark, text, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, fuzzy, sketch, realistic photography, gradients (unless background), poor composition, asymmetrical, messy, ugly
